prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.
- Character_The_Old_Man [The Old Man]: Also present (not shot focus); keep identity consistent: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair,....

CAST COUNT: exactly 2 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: ambient/Foley only — deathwatch beetle ticks; stifled groan. No dialogue.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_The_Narrator. The Old Man Silence. THE NARRATOR does not breathe. Does not move. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "after night, hearkening to the death watches in the wall.". Character_The_Narrator still wears dark waistcoat, black shirtsleeves, quiet leather shoes Camera directive: Close-up drifting slightly, 85mm lens, from old man's head toward dark wall where deathwatch ticks. Performance: Acting intensity 7/10: Haunted wide-eyed vigilance, nostril flare, jaw muscle twitch Optics: f/2.0 shallow depth of field, creamy soft bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, pitch-black voids, cool-teal shadows, faint warm amber lantern spill Character_The_Old_Man is on screen.

CONTINUITY: This is a seamless EXTENSION of the provided previous video. Pick up from its last frame. Same character identity, wardrobe, lighting, and location. Natural progressive motion only — do not invent a new establishing shot or redesign faces/outfits. IDENTITY: Match locked plate descriptions in CHARACTER VARIABLES exactly — do not drift to illustration, anime, cartoon, or a different face/wardrobe. On-screen: Character_The_Narrator, Character_The_Old_Man.

THIS CLIP:
Silent beat — no dialogue in this clip. Do not show any on-screen character speaking or mouthing words; keep mouths closed/neutral. End cleanly when the primary physical action finishes.
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_The_Old_Man. The Narrator A long hold: two silhouettes in the dark-one standing in the door-gap, one upright in the bed. A deathwatch beetle ticks in the wall. A slight groan-low, stifled. Character_The_Narrator still wears dark waistcoat, black shirtsleeves, quiet leather shoes; Character_The_Old_Man still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot Camera directive: Wide two-shot silhouettes, 24mm anamorphic, standing figure in door-gap and upright figure in bed, beetle ticking. Performance: Acting intensity 8/10: Rigid terror silhouette, mouth cracked stifled groan, eyes huge Optics: f/4 moderate-deep depth of field, both silhouettes held Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, pitch-black voids, cool-teal shadows, faint warm amber lantern spill / 480p, 24fps
